spanish: en mi interpretación diría que en la unión soviética querían asegurarse de que karpov mantuviera el título
english: In my interpretation I'd say that in the Soviet Union they wanted to make sure that Karpov kept the title
explanation: Uses imperfect subjunctive (mantuviera) after 'asegurarse de que' expressing doubt/purpose in the past

spanish: miedo de que él fuera a ganar y para asegurarse de que karpov mantenía el título
english: fear that he was going to win and to make sure that Karpov kept the title
explanation: Demonstrates imperfect subjunctive (fuera) after 'miedo de que' and the contrast with indicative (mantenía)

spanish: tendría que ser el candidato que demuestre ser el mejor
english: it should be the candidate who proves to be the best
explanation: Uses present subjunctive (demuestre) in a relative clause referring to an antecedent of undefined/unknown identity
